commands.repair_reason: - [P2] A narrow script-only repair can add stale monitored-pattern detection; maintainer review still needs to clear the security-adjacent review state afterward.; Needs attention: The diff adds no new dependency or runtime secret handling, but the new security-adjacent coverage report can produce false-clean results for stale monitored paths.; Review finding: [P1] Fail stale monitored patterns before passing --chec... commands.review_summary:
Adds an internal `pnpm policy:config-coverage` script and JSONC inventory for reporting/checking Policy-monitored config leaf coverage.

PR surface: Config +1, Other +966. Total +967 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: a stale `monitored` pattern produces no baseline leaf, so it is dropped before `unclassified` and the current `stale` check only examines classifications. I did not run the script because this was a read-only checkout review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow script-only repair can add stale monitored-pattern detection; maintainer review still needs to clear the security-adjacent review state afterward.
